markets.question: Atalanta BC vs. Hellas Verona FC: O/U 3.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie A game between Atalanta BC and Hellas Verona FC, scheduled for March 22 at 10:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Atalanta BC and Hellas Verona FC combine to score 4 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 4, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legaseriea.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

markets.question: Karolina Muchova vs. Iga Swiatek: Total Sets O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Karolina Muchova and Iga Swiatek in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of sets completed equals or exceeds 3. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
A super tie breaker is considered as one (1) set for total set markets.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: BNP Paribas Open: Karolina Muchova vs Iga Swiatek Total Sets: O/U 2.5

events.title: BNP Paribas Open: Karolina Muchova vs Iga Swiatek
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Karolina Muchova and Iga Swiatek in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 at 2:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Karolina Muchova' if Karolina Muchova advances against Iga Swiatek.

This market will resolve to 'Iga Swiatek' if Iga Swiatek advances against Karolina Muchova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Set 1 Winner: Muchova vs Swiatek
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Karolina Muchova and Iga Swiatek in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to “Muchova” if Karolina Muchova wins the first set. It will resolve to “Swiatek” if Iga Swiatek wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA match statistics.
markets.groupItemTitle: BNP Paribas Open: Karolina Muchova vs Iga Swiatek Set 1 Winner

events.title: BNP Paribas Open: Karolina Muchova vs Iga Swiatek

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

markets.question: Muchova vs. Swiatek: Set 1 Games O/U 8.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Karolina Muchova and Iga Swiatek in the BNP Paribas Open, scheduled for March 11 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 9. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.

This market will resolve to 'Iga Swiatek' if Iga Swiatek advances against Karolina Muchova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.
